title: SciLibMath v2: A Multimodal Contrastive Model for Mathematical Objects
description: A contrastive multimodal encoder for mathematical objects across five modalities (English text, Russian text, Lean 4 code, LaTeX notation, rendered formula images). Uses centroid representation to align five modality views into a shared 256-dimensional embedding space. Trained on approximately 972,000 multimodal mathematical objects.
